messages.content: What time does the library close today?
The library closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Can you tell me how to reset my password?
Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page, enter your email, and follow the link sent to your inbox.
Is it raining outside right now?
I can't see outside, but you can check the weather app on your phone for current conditions.
Hi! How's your day going?
Hello! My day is going well, thanks for asking. How about yours?
How many eggs do I need for a basic omelette?
Two or three eggs work well for one omelette.
What's the difference between a laptop and a tablet?
A laptop has a keyboard and more processing power, while a tablet is touchscreen and more portable and lighter.
Please remind me to call the dentist tomorrow.
I've set a reminder for you to call the dentist tomorrow morning.
Do squirrels hibernate during winter?
No, squirrels don't hibernate — they stay active all winter and rely on food they've stored.
What's the capital of Portugal?
Lisbon is the capital of Portugal.
How do I get to the train station from here?
Walk two blocks north on Main Street, then turn left on Oak Avenue — the station entrance is on your right.
Does Marcus know about the meeting on Friday?
I'm not sure — you might want to send him a quick message to confirm he has it on his calendar.
What should I bring to the potluck tonight?
Something easy like a salad, dessert, or drinks would be perfect.
Count the days from Monday to Friday, including both.
That's five days total — Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday.
Is your cat named Whiskers or Tiger?
I don't have a cat — I'm an AI assistant.
Turn off the lights when you leave the office.
I'm not able to control physical switches, but I can remind you to turn them off before you go.
Which color do you prefer — blue or green?
I don't have personal preferences, but both are nice colors. Which one do you like more?
What's the fastest way to cook rice?
Using a pressure cooker cuts the time to about 15 minutes, versus 20-30 minutes on the stove.
Good morning! Is the coffee ready?
Good morning! The coffee should be done in about two minutes.
How many chapters are in that book you recommended?
The book has 24 chapters, though some are quite short.
Did you finish your homework?
I don't have homework, but I can help you with yours if you'd like.
Can you pass the salt?
Sure, here you go.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it started about twenty minutes ago.
How many eggs do we need for this recipe?
The recipe calls for three eggs.
Where did you put my keys?
I left them on the kitchen counter next to your wallet.
Do you prefer coffee or tea in the morning?
I'd go with coffee — it helps me wake up faster.
Tell me the steps to reset your phone.
Go to Settings, find System, select Reset Options, then choose Factory Reset and confirm.
What's the capital of Australia?
Canberra is the capital of Australia.
How long is the bus ride from downtown to the airport?
It usually takes about forty-five minutes during rush hour, maybe thirty if traffic is light.
Did Marcus finish his homework?
He finished most of it, but he still has to write the essay.
Show me how to tie a basic knot.
Cross the rope over itself to make a loop, then pull one end through the loop and tighten.
When does the store open tomorrow?
It opens at 9 AM.
Is your dog friendly with other pets?
Yes, she gets along well with cats and other dogs.
How many people are coming to the party on Saturday?
So far I have twelve confirmations, but a few people haven't replied yet.
What's the best route to get to the museum from here?
Take Main Street north for about two miles, then turn right on Park Avenue — you'll see it on your left.
Do we have milk left in the fridge?
There's a little bit, but we should probably buy more when you go to the store.
What color is the new car you mentioned?
It's silver with black trim.
List the first five months of the year.
January, February, March, April, and May.
Is the meeting scheduled for Tuesday or Wednesday?
It's on Wednesday at 2 PM in Conference Room B.
How do I download a document from the website?
Click the blue Download button next to the file, and it will save to your computer.
What time does the museum close today?
It closes at 5 PM on weekdays.
Hi, do you have any fresh bread in stock?
Yes, we just pulled a batch out of the oven about twenty minutes ago.
Can you tell me which platform the train to Boston leaves from?
Platform 3, departing at 2:45 PM.
Is it supposed to rain tomorrow?
No, the forecast shows clear skies all day.
How do I reset the password on this account?
Click on 'Forgot Password' at the login screen, then check your email for a reset link.
Did Marcus finish his project on time?
He submitted it yesterday afternoon, so yes.
What's the difference between these two phone models?
The newer one has a better camera and longer battery life, but costs about $200 more.
How many eggs do you need for this recipe?
Three large eggs, beaten together.
Is the gym open on Sundays?
Yes, but only from 10 AM to 6 PM on Sundays.
Where should I turn to get to the harbor?
Take a left at the traffic light, then right on Pier Street.
How old is your dog?
She just turned seven last month.
Can I exchange this sweater for a different size?
Absolutely, as long as you have your receipt and the tag is still attached.
What's the next step in setting up the printer?
Connect the USB cable to your computer and install the drivers from the included CD.
Did Sarah say whether she could come to the dinner party?
She texted this morning to confirm she'll be there at 7.
How do you prefer your coffee?
Black, with just a little bit of sugar.
Which route takes less time, the highway or the back roads?
The highway is usually about fifteen minutes faster during rush hour.
Do you remember what Elena ordered last time?
I think she had the salmon with vegetables and rice.
Hello, is this the right building for the dentist's office?
Yes, they're on the second floor, suite 210.
How many chapters are in that book?
It has sixteen chapters, plus an appendix.
Should I water the plants today?
Yes, the soil looks pretty dry, especially in the big pot by the window.
What time does the bakery close today?
They close at 6 PM on weekdays.
Can you help me find my keys?
Where did you last remember seeing them?
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thank you for asking. How about you?
Is the train running on schedule today?
Yes, it's on time as of the last update.
Please pass the salt.
Here you go.
How many cups of flour do I need for this bread recipe?
You'll need three cups of all-purpose flour.
Does Marcus still work at the downtown office?
No, he transferred to the warehouse location last month.
What's the difference between these two jackets?
The blue one is wool and warmer; the gray one is cotton and lighter.
How do I reset my printer?
Hold the power button for ten seconds, then turn it back on.
Did Sarah bring her camera to the picnic?
Yes, she took lots of photos of everyone.
Count the chairs around the table for me.
There are six chairs in total.
What's your favorite color?
I don't have personal preferences, but blue is a calming color many people like.
Turn off the lights before you leave.
Already done—all the lights are off now.
Is this notebook more expensive than the other one?
No, this one is actually cheaper by five dollars.
What should I do if my laptop won't turn on?
First, try holding the power button for thirty seconds, then plug it in and try again.
Are you available tomorrow morning?
Yes, I'm free anytime after 9 AM.
Tell me the steps to make coffee.
Grind the beans, add them to the filter, pour hot water, and let it brew for a few minutes.
Did the package arrive yet?
It came this morning and is on the front porch.
Which route to the library is shorter?
Taking Oak Street is about two blocks shorter than Main Street.
Good morning!
Good morning! Hope you have a great day ahead.
Do you know where Marcus left his keys?
He usually leaves them on the kitchen counter, but you might want to check by the front door too.
Hi, how are you doing today?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you pass me the salt, please?
Sure, here you go.
Is the coffee still hot?
Yes, I just made it about ten minutes ago, so it should still be warm.
Which is faster — the train or the bus to downtown?
The train is usually faster; it takes about 20 minutes, while the bus can take 40.
How do I reset the printer?
Hold down the power button for about 10 seconds, then turn it back on.
Did Sarah confirm she's coming to dinner on Friday?
Yes, she texted this morning and said she'd be here around 7 PM.
How many people are on the team now?
There are six people total — three from the design group and three from development.
Good morning! Ready for the meeting?
Good morning. Yes, I've reviewed the agenda and I'm ready to go.
Turn off the light when you leave, okay?
Got it — I'll make sure to switch it off on my way out.
What does Elena do for work?
She's a graphic designer at an advertising firm downtown.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Yes, rain is expected in the afternoon, so you'll probably want one.
List the items in order: apple, bread, cheese, milk.
That's apple, bread, cheese, and milk — ready to go.
Does this shirt match these pants?
Yes, the colors work well together — they complement each other nicely.
What's the quickest way to make pasta?
Boil water, add salt, then cook the pasta according to the box instructions — usually 8 to 10 minutes.
Is David's birthday this week or next week?
It's next week — Saturday the 15th.
Can you tell me where the bathroom is?
It's down the hallway on your left, just past the kitchen.
Who won the game last night?
The home team won 3 to 1.
Should we try the new restaurant on Main Street?
Sure, I've heard good things about it. Let me check if they have a reservation available.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting?
He said he'd be there by 2 o'clock.
Hey, how's it going?
Pretty good, just finished lunch. How about you?
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll make sure to do that before I go.
Is the train station closer than the bus stop?
The bus stop is actually about five minutes closer from here.
How do I reset my password?
Click on 'Forgot Password' and then enter your email address.
How many people are on the guest list?
There are 24 people coming so far.
Do you have a pen I can borrow?
Yeah, there's one in the drawer by the desk.
What's the capital of Brazil?
Brasília is the capital of Brazil.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
The forecast says rain, so yeah, that's a good idea.
How long have you lived in your apartment?
About three years now.
Did Sarah reply to your email yet?
Not yet, but she usually responds within a day or two.
What should I make for dinner?
You could try pasta with vegetables — it's quick and easy.
Is the coffee shop open on Sundays?
Yes, they open at 9 AM on Sundays.
Where did you park the car?
I left it in the parking lot behind the store.
What color is your new jacket?
It's dark green with gray pockets.
Can dogs eat chocolate?
No, chocolate is toxic to dogs and should be avoided.
When's your birthday?
It's on October 15th.
Did the package arrive?
Yeah, it came this morning. It's by the front door.
How many chapters are in that book?
There are 18 chapters total.
Is your coffee machine still broken?
Yes, it stopped working on Tuesday. We're waiting for the repair technician to come on Friday.
Hey, how are you doing today?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. Just finished up some errands. How about you?
Can you pass me the salt?
Of course. Here you go.
Which train arrives first—the 3:15 or the 3:45?
The 3:15 arrives first, about thirty minutes before the other one.
Did Marcus ever call you back about the meeting?
No, he hasn't called yet. I'll try reaching him again tomorrow morning.
How do I reset the Wi-Fi router?
Press and hold the reset button on the back for about ten seconds until the lights flash.
Is there milk in the fridge?
Yes, there's a fresh carton on the top shelf from this morning.
Count the chairs in this room for me.
There are six chairs total—four around the table and two by the window.
Should I bring an umbrella to the picnic?
Yes, the forecast says there's a chance of rain in the afternoon, so it's a good idea.
Hi Jennifer, good to see you! How's everything?
Good to see you too! Everything's great. I just got back from visiting my sister last week.
What's the quickest way to get to the airport from here?
The highway is fastest if traffic isn't too heavy—about twenty minutes. The bus takes forty but is cheaper.
Do we have any meetings scheduled for next Tuesday?
Yes, you have one at 10 AM with the design team and another at 2 PM with client review.
Turn off the lights when you leave, please.
Will do. I'm heading out now anyway.
Is the new grocery store on the corner bigger than the old one?
Much bigger. It has about twice the floor space and more parking too.
Did you remember to book the hotel for the trip?
Not yet—I'll do it tonight and send you the confirmation by tomorrow morning.
How many pages does your essay need to be?
The teacher said between five and eight pages, double-spaced.
Can dogs eat chocolate?
No, chocolate is toxic for dogs, even in small amounts. You should keep it away from them.
What color is the car outside your house?
It's silver with a small dent on the passenger side.
Morning! Do you want to grab coffee before we start the day?
Morning! That sounds great—I could use a cup. There's a café down the street we could hit up.
What time does the museum close today?
The museum closes at 5 PM on weekdays.
Can you help me find my keys?
I'd check your jacket pockets, the kitchen counter, and near the door first — those are the most common places.
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Is this train going to Central Station?
Yes, this train stops at Central Station — it's the third stop from here.
How many eggs do I need for an omelette?
Usually two or three eggs is enough for a regular-sized omelette.
Do you prefer coffee or tea?
I'd go with coffee in the morning — it helps me wake up better.
Turn off the lights when you leave, please.
Sure, I'll turn them off before I go.

A wool coat is usually warmer — it insulates better against cold weather.
Where did you put the documents?
I left them in the filing cabinet next to your desk.
Is the bakery open on Sundays?
Yes, the bakery opens at 8 AM on Sundays and closes at 4 PM.
How do I reset my password?
Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.
Good morning, Marcus.
Good morning! Hope you slept well.
How many people are coming to the dinner?
Eight people total — four from my side and four from yours.
Should I wear the red dress or the blue one?
The blue dress would be better for that kind of event — it's more formal.
What's in the fridge right now?
There's milk, cheese, some leftover pasta, and a few vegetables.
Did the package arrive?
Yes, it came this afternoon — it's on the porch by the door.
Please feed the cat before you go out.
I'll feed her right now so she's all set.
Is Sarah's apartment bigger than Carlos's?
Sarah's is bigger — hers has three bedrooms and his only has two.
When does the game start tomorrow?
The game starts at 7 PM tomorrow evening.
Can I borrow your umbrella?
Of course — it's in the stand by the front door.
What time does the bakery on Fifth Street close?
They close at 7 PM on weekdays and 6 PM on Sundays.

I'd check near the entryway first — that's where people usually set them down when they come home.
Hi, how's your day going?
Pretty good, thanks for asking. How about yours?
Turn off the lights before you leave.
Sure, I'll switch them off on my way out.
Is it colder outside today than yesterday?
Yes, it's about 10 degrees colder — the forecast says it'll be 32 degrees today.

Press and hold the power button for 10 seconds, then turn it back on.
Which shelf are the plates on?
The dinner plates are on the second shelf from the top.
Did Marcus finish his homework?
Not yet — he said he'd be done by dinner time.
Count the eggs in the carton for me.
There are 11 eggs total.
Is this the right platform for the train to Boston?
Yes, platform 4 is correct. The train leaves in about 15 minutes.
What's for dinner tonight?
I'm making pasta with tomato sauce and grilled chicken.
Does Sarah prefer coffee or tea?
She usually goes for tea in the morning, but coffee in the afternoon.
Call me when you get home, okay?
Will do — I should be there around 5:30.
How many chapters are left in the book?
There are 8 chapters remaining.

Most locations stay open, but with shorter hours — usually 9 AM to 5 PM.

Mix the dry ingredients — flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Did the package arrive yet?
It came this morning — it's on the front porch.
Which movie are you in the mood for — action or comedy?
I'm leaning toward comedy tonight — something lighter after a long day.
How old is Grandpa Tom?
He just turned 78 last month.
Please water the plants while I'm out.
No problem — I'll make sure they're watered before I leave.
What time does the bakery close today?
The bakery closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Can you help me move this table to the corner?
Sure, I'll grab the other end and we can slide it over together.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it's been raining since this morning.
Hello, how are you doing today?
Hey! I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
How many eggs do I need for this recipe?
You'll need three eggs for that recipe.
Which route is faster, the highway or the back roads?
The highway is usually faster, especially during rush hour.
Do you know where I left my keys?
I saw them on the kitchen counter next to the coffee maker.
Can you pass the salt please?
Here you go, fresh out of the pantry.
Did Marcus call you back about the meeting?
Not yet, but he said he'd reach out by Friday.
Show me how to tie this knot.
Loop the rope around twice, then pull the end through and tighten gently.
Is your dog friendly with other dogs?
She usually is, though she's still a bit shy at first.
How many pages is that book?
It's 280 pages, a pretty quick read.
Should I bring an umbrella to the picnic?
Yeah, the forecast says there's a chance of showers in the afternoon.
Does this shirt match these pants?
Yes, the blue tones go well together.
What's your favorite type of cuisine?
I really enjoy Thai food, especially the curries.
Count how many plates are in the sink.
There are five plates and two bowls in there.
Did you remember to pay the electric bill?
Yes, I paid it online yesterday morning.
Where should we meet for lunch tomorrow?
How about the Italian place near the train station?
Is the printer working again?
It should be now — I replaced the cartridge and ran a test page.
Do you know how to fix a leaky faucet?
Yes, you usually just need to tighten the valve under the sink or replace the washer inside the tap.
Hi, how's your morning going?
Good, thanks for asking. I've been up since seven, already had my coffee.
Can you tell me where the nearest train station is?
The closest one is about two kilometers north, near the shopping center.
Is it warmer today than yesterday?
Yes, it's a few degrees warmer — should be around 22 degrees today.
Please remind me to call the dentist this week.
Noted — you need to call the dentist sometime this week before Friday.
How many slices do you usually get from a standard pizza?
Most pizzerias cut them into eight slices, though some do six for bigger pieces.
Should I wear a jacket when I go out?
It depends on where you're going, but it's probably a good idea since it's windy outside.
What's the difference between tea and coffee?
Coffee has more caffeine and a stronger taste, while tea is milder and comes in many varieties.

If you like comedies, the one everyone's been talking about lately is pretty fun and lighthearted.
Help me remember the steps to boil an egg.
First, put eggs in cold water, bring it to a boil, then turn off the heat and wait about ten minutes.

Yes, there's an Italian place two blocks away and a Thai restaurant on the corner that both have good reviews.
Hello, is this the right office building?
What's the address you're looking for? I can help you figure out if you're in the right place.
Tell me what you had for lunch yesterday.
I had a sandwich with turkey and tomato, and a side of chips from the deli counter.
Does your dog enjoy playing fetch?
Yes, she loves it — especially if I throw the ball near the water so she can run fast.
When is the next bus to downtown?
The next one comes in about fifteen minutes, number forty-seven from this stop.
Should I water the plants today?
Yes, the soil looks dry — they probably need water, especially in this heat.

Bandages, antiseptic wipes, gauze, tape, scissors, and pain relievers are the main things.
Is your birthday coming up soon?
Not for a few more months, but thanks for thinking of it.
Can you explain the rules of volleyball quickly?
Two teams hit a ball over a net trying to make it land on the other side — first to twenty-five points wins the set.

The library closes at 6 PM on Wednesdays.
Is it raining outside right now?
No, it's clear skies at the moment.
Hey, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you turn off the kitchen light for me?
Sure, I'll switch it off now.

Coffee tends to give a faster kick, but tea provides a gentler, longer-lasting lift.

Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page, then follow the email instructions.
How many eggs are in a standard carton?
Usually twelve eggs in a standard carton.
Did Marcus call this morning?
No, I didn't see any missed calls from him.
Hello! Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too! What's your name?
Please hand me that blue folder from the shelf.
Here you go — the blue folder on the left side.

A croissant is laminated with butter and has a flaky texture, while a danish typically has a filling and is a bit denser.

There are five main steps: sauté, simmer, blend, season, and serve.
Will you be free next Tuesday evening?
Yes, I'm available next Tuesday after 6 PM.
What's the fastest way to the train station from here?
Take the second left on Oak Street, then straight for two blocks.

I'm more productive in the morning, but some days the afternoon works just as well.
Can you tell me when the next bus arrives?
The next bus is in about seven minutes according to the schedule.

I sent her an email this morning, so she should be aware.

Jeans and a nice top would work well for something relaxed and comfortable.

Most pasta takes about eight to twelve minutes, depending on the type.

Yes, it closes at 9 PM so you have about two hours left.
Can you pass me the salt?
Sure, here you go.
Is the library open on Sundays?
Yes, it opens at 10 AM on Sundays.
How many eggs do we need for the recipe?
You'll need three eggs for this recipe.
Which is faster, the train or the bus?
The train is usually faster for longer distances.
Turn off the lights when you leave, please.
I'll make sure to do that.
What's your name?
I'm Claude, an AI assistant.
Does this shirt come in blue?
Yes, we have it in blue, green, and black.

Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the instructions in your email.

She said she'll be there around 7 PM.

There's one about two blocks north on Main Street.
What's the weather like outside?
It's cloudy right now, around 65 degrees, with a chance of rain later.
How many pages is this book?
It's 320 pages long.
Did you finish the report?
Yes, I completed it this morning and sent it to your email.
Tell me the steps to make coffee.
Grind the beans, add them to the filter, pour hot water, and wait about four minutes before drinking.
Is this restaurant vegetarian-friendly?
Yes, they have a whole section of vegetarian dishes on the menu.
When's your birthday?
I don't have a birthday since I'm an AI, but I appreciate the thought.
Which route has the least traffic right now?
The highway is clear, but the back roads through town might be slightly faster.
What time does the bakery close on Saturdays?
The bakery closes at 6 PM on Saturdays.
Hi, is this the right train to the airport?
Yes, this train goes directly to the airport. You'll arrive in about 25 minutes.
Can you pass me the salt, please?
Of course. Here you go.

Yes, he worked as a graphic designer for about three years before switching to his current job.
How many people are coming to the potluck tomorrow?
About twelve people confirmed so far. Three others said they might come.
Which is cheaper, the blue notebook or the red one?
The red one is two dollars cheaper.
Do I need to bring an umbrella today?
The forecast shows rain this afternoon, so yes, bringing an umbrella would be smart.
How do you make scrambled eggs?
Beat the eggs in a bowl, pour them into a buttered pan over medium heat, and stir gently until they're cooked through.
Is this your first time visiting the city?
No, I was here once five years ago, but everything looks different now.
What did Sarah order for lunch?
She got a grilled cheese sandwich and tomato soup.
Turn off the lights when you leave, okay?
Will do. I'll make sure to turn them off on my way out.

I've been here for two years now. I really enjoy it.
Is it okay if I borrow your pen for a minute?
Sure, go ahead. Just bring it back when you're done.
Which floor is the coffee shop on?
It's on the third floor, near the main staircase.
Did Daniel call you yesterday?
No, but he sent me a text in the evening.

Use a soft cloth slightly dampened with water or rubbing alcohol, and gently wipe between the keys.
Do you prefer tea or coffee in the morning?
I prefer coffee. Strong and black, if possible.
When does the movie start tonight?
The 7 PM showing, which is the one we're planning to see.
Did you finish the report, or do you need more time?
I finished it this morning. You can review it whenever you're ready.
Can the washing machine fit these blankets?
The large ones might be too thick. You'd have better luck taking them to the laundromat.
Can you help me find my keys?
I can't physically help, but try checking near the front door, kitchen counter, or by your bed—those are common spots.
Do cats need baths?
Most cats don't need regular baths since they clean themselves, but occasional baths can help if they get very dirty.
How do I boil an egg?
Put eggs in a pot, cover with cold water, bring to a boil, then remove from heat and let sit for 10 minutes before cooling in ice water.
Is it raining outside right now?
I don't have access to current weather, but you can check by looking outside or using a weather app on your phone.
Tell me how to tie my shoes.
Cross one lace over the other, pull tight, then make two loops and tie them together like you're tying a knot.
Hello, how are you today?
Hello! I'm doing well, thank you for asking. How can I help you?
Which is bigger, an apple or an orange?
They're usually about the same size, though it depends on the specific fruit.
How many days are in February?
February has 28 days in a regular year and 29 in a leap year.
Do I need an umbrella for tomorrow?
I can't check tomorrow's forecast, but checking a weather app would give you the most current prediction.
Remind me what happened last Tuesday at work.
I don't have access to your personal schedule or memories, so you'll need to check your calendar or work notes for that information.
What's a good way to organize my closet?
Try sorting by category—shirts together, pants together, dresses together—and within each category arrange by color. This makes finding things easier.
Is Monday coming before Wednesday this week?
Yes, Monday comes before Wednesday—Monday is the first weekday, and Wednesday is the third.
How tall is Mount Everest?
Mount Everest is about 29,032 feet, or 8,849 meters, tall.
Can you count the items in my refrigerator?
I can't see into your refrigerator, but you could make a quick list by opening it and counting what you see.
What's the quickest way to defrost chicken?
The quickest safe method is to place it in a sealed bag and submerge it in cold water, changing the water every 30 minutes—usually takes 1 to 2 hours.
Do dogs eat vegetables?
Yes, many vegetables are safe for dogs, like carrots, broccoli, and sweet potatoes, though some like onions and grapes are toxic.
How many continents are there?
There are seven continents: North America, South America, Europe, Africa, Asia, Australia, and Antarctica.
Should I water my plants today?
Check if the soil is dry by touching it—if it feels dry an inch below the surface, it's time to water.
Can you tell me how to reset my phone?
Go to Settings, find the Reset option, and select Erase All Data. Your phone will restart fresh.
Is Marcus coming to the party tomorrow?
He said he'd be there around 7 PM.
Hello! How are you doing?
Hi! I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Which is bigger, a watermelon or a pumpkin?
Watermelons are usually bigger — they can weigh 10 to 20 pounds, while most pumpkins are smaller.
Do I need an umbrella tomorrow?
